title: Multiplied Drop Challenge!
description: Every block you mine increases a global multiplier that boosts all drops — blocks and mobs.
body:
Double Blocks Challenge is a chaotic survival challenge mod that increases drops every time you break a block or kill a mob.

How it works:
- Every block you mine increases a global multiplier by +2
- Every mob you kill also increases the multiplier
- All future drops (blocks AND animals) are multiplied by this value

Example:
1st block → x1
2nd block → x3
3rd block → x5
4th block → x7
...

This applies to:
- Logs
- Stone
- Ores
- Animals (meat, leather, etc.)

The multiplier is global and keeps increasing throughout your playthrough.

⚠️ Warning:
This mod gets very overpowered over time and may cause lag if too many items spawn.

Perfect for:
- Survival challenges
- Speedruns
- Content creation
- Chaos runs

Client-side display is minimal — this is meant to be a raw gameplay modifier.

Have fun breaking your world :)
